description: Style NoteThe man of style always chooses his trousers with care, and scullers makes it all the easier with this classsy range of chinos. Designed with the choicest of fabrics, they make for perfect semi-formal wear when paired with a classic formal shirt and leather shoes.Product DetailsGrey trousers with two side pockets, four zippered pockets on the front legs, brand name appliqued on the left leg, metallic embellishments on the pockets, two pockets at the back with velcro closure, brand badge appliqued above the left back pocket, a comfortable waistband with loops and button and zipper closure on the front  Material and Care70% cotton and 30% nylonHand wash or machine wash coldWash dark colours separatelyTumble dry lowDo not bleachWarm ironSize and FitSlim fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
